case_title: MAPLE RABB ET AL VS. MICHELLE CHAVEZ-BRUBERG ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES (2) BY PLAINTIFFS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RABB, MAPLE COLARADO, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ-BRUBERG, MICHELLE THIBODEOUX, PATRICK $4,175.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,295.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
